title: Creating a workspace template and maintaining the folder structure
excerpt: Hi, we’ve created a workspace template with multiple boards grouped in different folders and sub-folders. When we use the template the folder structure is lost. Can we avoid that?

posts.author: radmunson (Radu M)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we’ve created a workspace template with multiple boards grouped in different folders and sub-folders. When we use the template the folder structure is lost. Can we avoid that?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @radmunson and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

If you follow these steps, you can keep your folder structure:

  1. Click on “Add”
  2. Click on “Choose from templates”
  3. Click on your template
  4. Click on the dropdown arrow on the top right of the screen next to “Use Template”
  5. Click on “New Worskspace”

This will create a new workspace from the template and the folder structure will be there.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
